# bad-seconds-duration

Invalid seconds duration values emit error diagnostics via secondsDurationPtr

!!! tip "Direction: `from`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `from` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/regressions/bad-seconds-duration` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  controller.self.heal.timeout.seconds: not-an-int
  controller.sync.timeout.seconds: also-bad
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer: {}
  controller:
    selfHeal: {}
    sync: {}
  repoServer: {}
  server: {}
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cm->cr
  key: controller.self.heal.timeout.seconds
  message: 'invalid seconds duration "not-an-int": strconv.Atoi: parsing "not-an-int":
    invalid syntax'
  severity: error
- direction: cm->cr
  key: controller.sync.timeout.seconds
  message: 'invalid seconds duration "also-bad": strconv.Atoi: parsing "also-bad":
    invalid syntax'
  severity: error
```
